question: What is load balancing loss in MoE? Why is it needed?
code_hint: Encourages equal expert utilization, prevents few experts from being overloaded
expected_output: Load balancing loss: auxiliary loss to ensure equal expert usage, prevents router collapse
template:
# MoE Load Balancing:
# - Auxiliary loss added to main loss
# - Loss = -importance_variance (want equal utilization)
# - Encourages router to distribute tokens evenly across experts
# - Prevents router collapse (always selecting same experts)

print("Load balancing loss: auxiliary loss to ensure equal expert usage, prevents router collapse")
answer:
# MoE Load Balancing:
# - Auxiliary loss added to main loss
# - Loss = -importance_variance (want equal utilization)
# - Encourages router to distribute tokens evenly across experts
# - Prevents router collapse (always selecting same experts)

print("Load balancing loss: auxiliary loss to ensure equal expert usage, prevents router collapse")
